titleStmt.title: SII 9.416: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 416. (A.R. No. 381 of 1928.) ON A STONE SET UP IN MODANKUPPA BANTWAL-MUDA, MANGALORE TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1299, Piṅgaḷa, Siṁha 10, Śanivāra, corresponding to A.D. 1377 August 8 Saturday, in the reign of Hariyappa-Oḍeya, son of Bukkaṇṇa-Oḍeya. It records that when Paṇḍaridēva was ruling over Maṅgalūru-rājya, certain śeṭṭis made a grant of some plots of land for the service of the god Timirēśvaradēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīśakavaruṣa 1299 neya piṁgaḷasaṁvatsarada siṁ
hamāsa 10 śanivāradalu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rā
japaramēsvara śrīvīrabukkaṁṇaOḍeyara kumāra hariya
ppaOḍeyaru stirarājyaṁgeyutta paṁḍaridēvaṁgaḷu maṁgalū
ra rājyavanāḷuttiha kāladalu pudugrāmadalu happatti
yaduvatti bāḷakuḍuvatti Āḷuvana vūlapūjaṁ pā
tipāḍi ba ṁtivaru yeṁba bhūmi lakṣakkaṁ
vara phala mane bhāvi kuṁṭe beṭṭu yiṁtī sarvvasvava
tala seṭṭiyaru timirēsvaradēvarige dhārāpūrvaka
vāgi koṭṭaru Ā bhūmiyanu paṁḍaridēvaṁgaḷu Ā mū
ligarē teṟu siddhāya naṭṭu beḍe yese Osage jōḍi yivanellava
nū Ā mūligarē naḍesi dēvarige naḍasi baha bhattaṁ mūḍe
(ḍe) 100 yī bhatta naḍeyade vuḷidaḍe Ā mūlavanū O
ppisuva Aḍake . yī dharmavanu pālisidavarige sāvira ka
vileyanu dānava māḍida phala yī dharmakāvanānū
vakravādare vāraṇāsiyalu sāvira brā(ṁ)hmarunū sā
vira kapileyenū koṁda dōṣa yī dharmava māḍi
davarige maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī guru śaraṇā timerē
svara .
Digital edition of SII 9.416 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
